hero.title: Discover. Book. Create. Earn — Travel Reinvented with AI, Agent Bidding & Creator Collabs
hero.subtitle: Use AI to plan fast, get agents bidding to save more, or book CoCurated trips — built by pros, backed by influencers, and designed to deliver value.

howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.intro: Discover, plan, and share luxury travel — all in one intelligent platform.
howItWorks.paragraph1: Goldsainte blends AI technology with human expertise to make luxury travel effortless. Start by chatting with your personal concierge or saying "Hey Goldsainte." It learns your style — where you love to stay, dine, and explore — refining recommendations with every conversation.
howItWorks.paragraph2: Discover CoCurated™ collections designed by trusted creators and certified agents. Save your favorites, follow tastemakers who inspire you, and let our AI weave everything into itineraries that feel tailor-made.
howItWorks.paragraph3: Ready to plan? Post your trip and let expert agents bid to design your journey. Compare proposals, chat in real time, and choose the perfect fit — all with transparent pricing and milestone payments for peace of mind.
howItWorks.paragraph4: Book instantly through Goldsainte — flights, hotels, dining, and more — with secure checkout and automatic itinerary creation. Then, connect, share, and earn by becoming a creator yourself. Curate destinations, inspire travelers, and make money when others book from your recommendations.
howItWorks.paragraph5: Everything happens in one elegant platform — AI-driven, creator-powered, and designed for those who travel well.
howItWorks.subtitle: Luxury travel, reinvented.

voiceAI.title: Voice AI Search
voiceAI.description: Say "Hey Goldsainte" and speak naturally. Our AI instantly surfaces luxury hotels, experiences, and hidden gems tailored to your style.

cocurated.title: CoCurated Itineraries
cocurated.description: Your AI builds complete trip plans instantly — pulling from your saved favorites and trusted creator collections. Edit, refine, or regenerate with one click.

social.title: Creator Social Network
social.description: Follow tastemakers, luxury agents, and fellow travelers. Discover their curated collections, save their favorites, and chat directly for insider intel.

agents.title: Expert Agent Support
agents.description: Post your trip and let certified luxury agents compete to plan it. Compare proposals, chat in real-time, and choose the perfect match for your journey.

instant.title: Instant Booking
instant.description: Book flights, hotels, restaurants, and experiences instantly with secure checkout. Your complete itinerary is generated automatically.

stores.title: Creator Stores
stores.description: Become a travel creator. Curate your favorite destinations, build themed collections, and earn when others book from your store. Your taste, monetized.

creatorHero.paragraph1: Turn your passion for travel into profit. Share stunning content, grow your audience, and unlock new revenue streams through engagement rewards, brand collaborations, and curated trip packages.
creatorHero.paragraph2: Earn real money as your posts gain likes, comments, and shares — or create and sell travel experiences directly to your followers.
creatorHero.paragraph3: Collaborate with top brands, access powerful creator tools, and inspire a global community of explorers. Whether you're a seasoned influencer or just getting started, this is where your travel story becomes your business.
